evidence: frontend/src/App.tsx — route nested under ProtectedRoute with requiresAuth handle meta

frontend/src/components/DashboardLayout.tsx — applies data-bubble-id bTHDf on shell root when pageBubbleId provided
frontend/src/pages/Paths.tsx — passes headerBubbleId and sidebarBubbleId to DashboardLayout
frontend/src/components/DashboardLayout.tsx — forwards instance ids to Header and AppSidebar
frontend/src/components/shell/Header.tsx — data-bubble-id={bubbleId} with paths override (defaults ai_RNbBKLUc)
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx — data-bubble-id={bubbleId} on Sidebar root with paths override (defaults ai_RNbBKLUe)
ir/inventory.json — ai_RNbBKLUn and ai_RNbBKLUo are CustomElement children of bTHDf per bTHDg____root.json
frontend/src/pages/Paths.tsx — prototype path cards wrapped in div with data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHYGq and data-module-owner MOD-DRSAM-PATHS

functional_audit.check: /paths route registered and auth-guarded via ProtectedRoute parent
Paths page mounts AppShellLayout (DashboardLayout) with page-level CustomElement instance overrides
Paths content renders inside ai_RNbBHYGq boundary; path_page_tab_os_ tab router deferred to MOD-DRSAM-PATHS
evidence: ir/inventory.json — custom_state:bTHDf:path_page_tab_os_ present in slice but not wired in shell scope

ui_evidence.notes: Page root on DashboardLayout outer wrapper when Paths passes pageBubbleId
Paths-specific header CustomElement instance on Header via bubbleId override
Paths-specific sidebar CustomElement instance on AppSidebar via bubbleId override
paths-main content boundary wraps page children with data-module-owner MOD-DRSAM-PATHS

gaps.finding: IR places ai_RNbBKLUn, ai_RNbBKLUo, and ai_RNbBHYGq as bTHDf siblings; React shell still nests Header inside the main column to the right of the sidebar (inherited from SHELL-05). Page-instance markers are correct but full-width header sibling layout remains unresolved.

critiques.finding: SHELL-08 added correct page-instance bubble ids (ai_RNbBKLUn/ai_RNbBKLUo) but did not restructure DashboardLayout to match bTHDg sibling order (full-width header above sidebar+main row). Header remains nested in the right column per SHELL-05 shadcn SidebarProvider pattern.
critiques.alternative: Restructure DashboardLayout: offline banner → full-width Header (page instance) → flex row (sidebar instance | scrollable main containing only ai_RNbBHYGq children), aligning DOM hierarchy with IR page-root siblings.

critiques.finding: Decompose scope defers path tabs and enrollment UI to MOD-DRSAM-PATHS, but brownfield implementation retains full prototype path-card grid inside ai_RNbBHYGq. Ownership marker (data-module-owner) and paths-main boundary are present; tab router (path_page_tab_os_) and enrollment subtree alignment are correctly deferred.
critiques.alternative: If strict shell-only landing is required, replace prototype path cards with a minimal placeholder inside ai_RNbBHYGq until PATHS-01+ lands; otherwise document brownfield retention as intentional in coverage preflight.

critiques.finding: frontend/src/lib/paths/routes.ts exports PATHS_ROUTE but authenticatedRoutes.tsx still hardcodes '/paths' string instead of importing the constant.
critiques.alternative: Import PATHS_ROUTE in authenticatedRoutes.tsx (and any navigate targets) for single source of truth.
